summary: AdMob Rewarded Ads Integration (FREE11) fully tested. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: page loads correctly, Watch Ad button shows 10 coins on web, mock simulation countdown + claim works, admob_complete/failed URL params work with toasts. One minor double-execution issue due to React StrictMode in dev.

integration_issues.issue: React StrictMode (development mode) causes useEffect([]) to run TWICE — the backend is called twice, crediting 40 coins instead of 20, and toast appears twice. NOT a production issue (StrictMode effects run once in production builds). Fix: add a useRef guard inside the useEffect to prevent double execution.
integration_issues.severity: MINOR - dev-only, won't happen in production

integration_issues.issue: After claiming AdMob reward (handleAdMobCallback), loadStatus() only refreshes ad status. user.coins_balance in AuthContext is NOT immediately updated. Navbar shows stale balance until next auth/me fetch. Fix: call updateUser or fetchUser after reward claim.

action_items: LOW: Add useRef guard in RewardedAds.js useEffect to prevent double-call of handleAdMobCallback in React StrictMode: `const callbackRanRef = useRef(false); if (callbackRanRef.current) return; callbackRanRef.current = true;`
LOW: In handleAdMobCallback, after reward is credited, call updateUser({coins_balance: ...}) or fetchUser() from AuthContext to refresh navbar balance immediately
critical_code_review_comments: RewardedAds.js handleAdMobCallback: No idempotency key — if the web page is opened twice with ?admob_complete=1 (e.g., due to StrictMode or user navigating back), the backend will credit coins multiple times. The backend /api/v2/ads/reward does not check for duplicate requests within the same session.

POST /api/v2/ads/reward endpoint: The daily limit check uses count_documents on ad_events. Both mock (/ads/complete) and real AdMob (/ads/reward) share the same counter and DAILY_LIMIT=5. This means if a user watches 3 mock ads and 2 AdMob ads, they hit the limit. This is correct behavior but should be documented.
v2ClaimAdMobReward in api.js correctly maps to POST /api/v2/ads/reward (20 coins). The mock v2StartAd/v2CompleteAd remain separate (10 coins). The separation is clean.

Android TWA: RewardedAdActivity.java BACKEND_URL points to https://free11.com/api/v2/ads/reward (hardcoded production URL). This is acceptable for production APK but would require a build variant for testing against staging/preview URLs.
seed_data_creation: Registered test users: test_admob_fix@free11.com, test_limit_* (for daily limit testing), test_decr_* (for decrement testing). These users have varying ad_events counts from tests.

mocked_apis_noted: POST /api/v2/ads/reward - REAL backend (20 coins, AdMob integration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdMob Rewarded Ads (FREE11 FREE11 feature) fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/v2/ads/reward at v2_routes.py line 333, ADMOB_DAILY_LIMIT=5, ADMOB_REWARD_COINS=20, stores in ad_events collection (shared with mock). Frontend: RewardedAds.js at /watch-earn, isAndroidTWA() detection, buildAdIntent() for Android, web mock fallback (v2StartAd/v2CompleteAd), handleAdMobCallback() for ?admob_complete=1 URL param. Android TWA: RewardedAdActivity.java exists, AndroidManifest has free11://rewarded-ad intent filter. Admin account is at daily limit (5/5). Use test_admob_fix@free11.com for further UI testing. Two minor issues: (1) React StrictMode double-execution in dev (not prod), (2) Navbar balance doesn't immediately refresh after reward claim.

double_execution.root_cause: React 18 StrictMode (in development mode) intentionally double-invokes effects to detect side effects. The useEffect in RewardedAds.js with empty deps [] runs twice: mount → cleanup → remount. handleAdMobCallback() is called twice per page load in development.
double_execution.reproduction_steps: Navigate to /watch-earn?admob_complete=1 in development mode with React StrictMode enabled (index.js wraps in <React.StrictMode>)
double_execution.mitigation: Add useRef guard: `const ranRef = useRef(false); if(ranRef.current) return; ranRef.current = true;` as first lines inside the useEffect callback
double_execution.production_impact: None - StrictMode double-invocation only occurs in development builds

navbar_balance_stale.root_cause: handleAdMobCallback calls loadStatus() which only fetches ad status (via v2GetAdStatus). The user.coins_balance in AuthContext is not refreshed. The Navbar reads user.coins_balance from AuthContext.
navbar_balance_stale.mitigation: Call updateUser({coins_balance: prevBalance + data.reward_coins}) or call fetchUser() from AuthContext after reward claim
